calendar.matters:
MOTION For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Nov-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s MOTION For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

Moving party has filed a Satisfaction of Judgment and the matter is off calendar according to counsel for moving party, David Cook.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Etc.
Off Calendar Aug-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ryan L. Dahm of the law offices of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC (415-989-4730) appears as counsel for plaintiff/defendant/moving/opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Motion And Motion For Assignment Etc. is GRANTED. The motion is unopposed. Counsel to moving party shall submit an appropriate order at the hearing or via email to jameshfleming@gmail.com, including the notices required by Code of Civil Procedure Sections 699.040(c) and 708.520(d) and the limitation provided by Code of Civil Procedure Section 708.510(d). Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2017 Off Calendar
